name: Zucchini Chili
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Zucchini, cut into 1/2-inch cubes (about 2 small)
1 cup Green pepper, cut into 1/2-inch cubes
2 cups Beans, canned (Kidney and/or Garbanzo), drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a large skillet.
2. Add zucchini, onion, garlic, and green pepper.
3. Saute for 10 minutes until softened.
4. Transfer mixture to a saucepan.
5. Add tomatoes, chili powder, cumin, oregano, parsley, salt, and pepper.
6. Cook over low heat, uncovered, for 10 minutes.
7. Stir in beans and cook an additional 10 minutes on low heat.
8. Adjust seasonings as needed.
9. Serve chili rolled up in a warm flour tortilla or on a bed of brown rice.
10. Serves 4.
Variation: Substitute unpeeled medium eggplant, cut into 1/2-inch cubes, for the zucchini.
